Dubai Festivals and Retail Establishment (DFRE), part of the Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism (DET), and Dubai Chambers launch ‘Win Your Home in Dubai’, a first-of-its-kind citywide initiative that offers citizens, residents, and visitors the opportunity to turn their everyday spending across the retail sector into a real chance to own a home in the emirate. Running from 22 May to 30 August 2026 over a period of 12 weeks, the ‘Win Your Home in Dubai’ campaign allows every spend of AED500 or more at 3,500 participating outlets across Dubai to qualify as an entry into the draw to win a home in Dubai. The campaign includes 12 residential units across Dubai provided by Binghatti Developer
